title: SugarCraft — CandyInput
description: CandyInput: Terminal escape sequence decoder — keys, Kitty keyboard protocol, SGR 1006 mouse, focus, bracketed paste. The missing input layer for PHP TUI.
ogDescription: EscapeDecoder consumes raw TTY bytes and emits typed Events. Supports legacy keys, Kitty keyboard protocol, SGR 1006 mouse, focus events, and bracketed paste. Pioneering for PHP TUI.
